zonal_entropy.regime_note: 100% chaotic — adapter always uses 100-draw cold fallback (entropy > 2.2 bits for all 1500 target draws)

cold_complement_2bet.rationale: Deterministic adapter (P56). Single 1500-window: M3+=3.67% (-0.20pp vs 3.87% baseline). Delta within 2SE noise band (SE≈0.50pp at N=1500). Regime: standard cold-complement selection. Coverage expansion justifies inclusion despite sub-baseline M3+. NOT a performance improvement claim.

zonal_entropy_2bet.rationale: Determinism verified in P64c (5 checks, 0 violations; random.seed() removed in P56). Single 1500-window: M3+=3.67% (-0.20pp vs 3.87% baseline). Delta within 2SE noise band (SE≈0.50pp at N=1500). P57 precedent: same result, p=0.656. Notable: 100% chaotic regime — adapter always uses cold fallback. Distinct entropy axis provides signal diversity. NOT a performance improvement claim.
zonal_entropy_2bet.notable: 100% of 1500 draws classified as chaotic (entropy > 2.2 bits). Adapter in practice = cold fallback at window=100 for all draws.

lag_reversion_2bet.rationale: Adapter not yet built (DEFER_ADAPTER_BUILD). Window inconsistency: w150=0.67%, w500=2.00%, w1500=3.73%. Severe short-window underperformance indicates regime-sensitive signal. Cannot safely propose production apply without adapter + tuning.

proposal.rationale: Option D: Apply both cold_complement_2bet and zonal_entropy_2bet. Both are READY_WITH_CAUTION (M3+=3.67%, -0.20pp, within 2SE noise band). Distinct signal axes (frequency-gap vs entropy-adaptive) justify dual coverage. This is a coverage expansion, NOT a performance superiority claim. lag_reversion_2bet excluded (GATE_FAIL, DEFER_ADAPTER_BUILD).

authorization_phrases_required.zonal_entropy_2bet: YES apply zonal_entropy_2bet 1500 rows to production for P66
